privileged_info_summary: No metadata field found in task.json. Task uses real Unsplash images as primary data source with synthetic fallback via ImageMagick. The task requires adding a white border around a portrait image in GIMP by expanding canvas and filling border regions with uniform color. Verifier checks for: (1) size increase of at least 20px, (2) proportional increase within 10px difference, (3) content preservation with SSIM >= 0.95, (4) uniform light-colored border regions. Success requires meeting at least 3 out of 4 criteria (75% threshold).
